title: rubus lambertianus var. lambertianus
intro: Rubus lambertianus var. lambertianus, also known as the Lambert's raspberry or Red-flowering raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to Western Australia. It is a thorny shrub used in traditional herbal medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues such as digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions, offering benefits like improved digestion, reduced inflammation, and enhanced immune function. Rubus lambertianus var. lambertianus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herb for various herbal preparations.
